content: Phase 1: Create POC script - test AI search with Gemini 2.5 Flash + structured JSON output + hybrid fallback
Phase 1: Run POC test matrix (12 queries) until stable - 12/12 PASSED (100%)
Phase 2: Design agent - get premium futuristic design guidelines
Phase 2: Build backend - models, seed 50-80 tools + 10-12 articles, API endpoints
Phase 2: Build frontend - homepage, search, tool/article pages with futuristic UI
Phase 2: All user stories adhered to in development
Phase 2: End-to-end testing using testing_agent_v3 - 100% PASSED (Backend 17/17, Frontend all flows)
